proposal_text:
Title: Echoes: Sanctuary Within
Concept: Discover peace in the everyday. Your thoughts shape reality.
Website Product Description: Dive into "Echoes: Sanctuary Within," a unique modern-setting game where the mundane becomes magnificent. In a world full of daily stresses, you'll uncover hidden "memory shards" that allow you to construct and explore your own "mental sanctuaries." These personal havens are more than just spaces; they are living reflections of your inner world, where "your thoughts become reality." Navigate intricate "mental labyrinths" to solve puzzles and unlock deeper understanding of yourself, finding calm and clarity amidst the chaos. This is your personal journey of escape and discovery, transforming ordinary moments into extraordinary experiences, offering a truly rewarding and intuitive path to inner peace.

Title: Memory Weaver
Concept: Unravel forgotten histories, stitch together lost lives.
Website Product Description: Step into a world where history comes alive through your hands. In *Memory Weaver*, you are more than a spectator; you are a reconstructor of the past. Embark on a deeply personal journey to uncover fragmented stories and breathe life into forgotten individuals, not just by learning about them, but by actively piecing them back together. Your most powerful companion is the unique, in-game 'Memory Journal.' This vital tool transforms the abstract quest of rediscovering history into a tangible and engaging experience. As you explore, you'll gather clues, connect significant events, and record your revelations, seeing the pieces of forgotten narratives come together before your eyes. This intuitive process isn't just gameplay; it's a core loop that builds emotional resonance with every memory you recover. Discover the lost emotions, triumphs, and struggles, and truly feel the weight and wonder of history through your own discoveries.
